economic_notes: Council owns 1,035 of 4,004,150 limited partnership units in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GILP), which invests 13.34% in Denendeh Investments Limited Partnership. Investment is effectively nil value after impairment.
notes: Province code set to NT (Northwest Territories) not AB despite auditor being in Calgary AB. Contributions Repayable of $163,404 to Indigenous Services Canada unchanged from prior year - represents amounts potentially to be repaid. Jordan's Principle funding (CIRNAC) was a major addition of $1,624,654 to deferred contributions. Net financial assets is negative (net financial debt) of $237,607. No budget figures were provided in the statements (all budget columns show dashes). Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership investment is carried at $1 after impairment. Te Pee Housing Association receivable of $370,226 is included in accounts receivable.
